title: Ericsson Software Developer Intern Interview Questions & Practice
metaDescription: Ace your Ericsson Software Developer Intern interview with AI-powered practice questions and feedback. Get ready for your Montreal, Quebec, Canada internship.
content:
# Ericsson Software Developer Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Ericsson Software Developer Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Montreal, Quebec, Canada
**Application Status:** Open for Applications

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Ericsson
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Ericsson is offering a Software Developer Intern internship position in Montreal, Quebec, Canada. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Ericsson's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Ericsson interview and increase your chances of success.
